mode.title: Repository Review Mode
mode.purpose: Review PRs for correctness and risk.

inputs.item: Inline review comments and review threads, including Codex comments when present

actions.item: Check tests, docs, security, accessibility and release impact.
Create harm register when ethics triggers are met.
Classify Codex and automated review comments as legitimate, false positive, superseded or blocked.

When a Codex or automated review comment is legitimate, require the implementing agent to add a thumbs-up reaction to the original comment, reply with how the issue was overcome and resolve the review thread only after the fix and evidence are complete.

outputs.item: Automated review comment disposition for each Codex or automated reviewer thread

failure_states.item: Resolving a legitimate Codex or automated review thread before the issue has been overcome
Failing to acknowledge a legitimate Codex or automated review comment with a thumbs-up reaction and explanatory reply
